sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57286" key="khtofa/gos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κητο-φάγος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n57286.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eating sea-monsters</tr_>, prob. <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σιτοφάγος</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:10:12:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.12.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
